sourcesContent:
export const PROPERTIES = [
  { id:1, name:"The Olive Residence",   location:"Dago Atas, Bandung",   price:2400000000, badge:"Baru",      beds:4, baths:3, area:280, garage:2, floor:2, year:2024, type:"Rumah Tapak", status:"Dijual",
    img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600596542815-ffad4c1539a9?w=900&q=85",
    imgs:["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600596542815-ffad4c1539a9?w=900&q=85","https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600607687939-ce8a6c25118c?w=900&q=85","https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600566753086-00f18fb6b3ea?w=900&q=85","https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?w=900&q=85"],
    desc:"Hunian mewah dengan desain modern minimalis di kawasan premium Dago Atas. Dikelilingi pemandangan kota Bandung yang menakjubkan, properti ini menawarkan kombinasi sempurna antara kenyamanan dan kemewahan.", facilities:["Kolam Renang","Taman Privat","Smart Home","CCTV 24 Jam","Generator","Water Heater","AC Sentral","Keamanan 24 Jam"], lat:-6.878, lng:107.617 },
  { id:2, name:"Serene Hills Cluster A", location:"Arcamanik, Bandung",  price:1800000000, badge:"Terlaris",  beds:3, baths:2, area:180, garage:1, floor:2, year:2023, type:"Rumah Tapak", status:"Dijual",

    desc:"Cluster perumahan dengan konsep green living di Arcamanik. Lingkungan asri dengan taman komunal, jogging track, dan fasilitas olahraga lengkap untuk keluarga aktif.", facilities:["Taman Komunal","Jogging Track","Playground","CCTV 24 Jam","Water Heater","Keamanan 24 Jam"], lat:-6.932, lng:107.681 },
  { id:3, name:"Ivory Grand House",      location:"Buah Batu, Bandung",   price:3200000000, badge:"Promo",     beds:5, baths:4, area:350, garage:2, floor:3, year:2024, type:"Rumah Tapak", status:"Dijual",

    desc:"Rumah mewah tiga lantai dengan konsep arsitektur kontemporer. Ruang keluarga lapang, dapur gourmet, dan ruang cinema privat menjadikan hunian ini sempurna untuk keluarga besar.", facilities:["Kolam Renang","Home Theater","Dapur Gourmet","Smart Home","Generator","CCTV 24 Jam","Lift","AC Sentral"], lat:-6.952, lng:107.649 },
  { id:4, name:"Casa Verde Villa",       location:"Lembang, Bandung",     price:4500000000, badge:"Eksklusif", beds:6, baths:5, area:500, garage:3, floor:2, year:2023, type:"Villa",       status:"Dijual",
    img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=900&q=85",
    imgs:["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=900&q=85","https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600596542815-ffad4c1539a9?w=900&q=85","https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1613490493576-7fde63acd811?w=900&q=85"],
    desc:"Villa mewah di kawasan sejuk Lembang dengan view pegunungan memukau. Desain arsitektur tropis modern dengan sentuhan alam yang membuat setiap momen menjadi istimewa.", facilities:["Kolam Renang Infinity","Taman Privat 1000m²","BBQ Area","Gazebo","Smart Home","Generator","CCTV 24 Jam","Keamanan 24 Jam"], lat:-6.812, lng:107.617 },
  { id:5, name:"Amber Residence",        location:"Cimahi, Bandung",      price:1200000000, badge:"Baru",      beds:3, baths:2, area:150, garage:1, floor:2, year:2025, type:"Rumah Tapak", status:"Dijual",
    img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1564013799919-ab600027ffc6?w=900&q=85",

  { id:6, name:"The Pearl Townhouse",    location:"Antapani, Bandung",    price:2100000000, badge:"Terlaris",  beds:4, baths:3, area:220, garage:2, floor:3, year:2024, type:"Townhouse",   status:"Dijual",
    img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1598228723793-52759bba239c?w=900&q=85",

    desc:"Townhouse eksklusif tiga lantai di lokasi strategis Antapani. Rooftop garden dengan pemandangan kota, ruang kerja privat, dan akses mudah ke pusat kota Bandung.", facilities:["Rooftop Garden","Ruang Kerja","Smart Home","CCTV 24 Jam","Water Heater","Keamanan 24 Jam"], lat:-6.921, lng:107.668 },
];

export const BANKS = [
  { id:"btn",    name:"BTN",        logo:"🏗", rate:10.25, maxTenor:30, minDP:10, color:"#1A5276", note:"Spesialis KPR terpercaya" },
  { id:"bca",    name:"BCA",        logo:"🏦", rate:10.5,  maxTenor:30, minDP:10, color:"#005BAA", note:"Proses cepat 5 hari kerja" },
  { id:"bri",    name:"BRI",        logo:"🏛", rate:10.75, maxTenor:30, minDP:10, color:"#00529B", note:"Khusus ASN/PNS bunga 9.5%" },
  { id:"bni",    name:"BNI",        logo:"🏩", rate:10.9,  maxTenor:25, minDP:15, color:"#FF6600", note:"Cicilan tetap 3 tahun pertama" },
  { id:"mandiri",name:"Mandiri",    logo:"🏢", rate:11.0,  maxTenor:30, minDP:15, color:"#003D7C", note:"Gratis biaya provisi bulan ini" },
  { id:"cimb",   name:"CIMB Niaga", logo:"🔴", rate:11.25, maxTenor:25, minDP:20, color:"#D40000", note:"Diskon rate nasabah prioritas" },
];

export const BADGE_COLOR = { Baru:"#B5844A", Terlaris:"#2C1F14", Promo:"#4A7C59", Eksklusif:"#6B4F8C" };

export const TESTIMONIALS = [
  { init:"A", name:"Andika Pratama",   loc:"Pembeli, The Olive Residence",    text:"Proses pembelian sangat lancar. Tim Havenest sangat profesional dan membantu kami mendapatkan properti sesuai anggaran dengan cepat sekali." },
  { init:"R", name:"Rina Kusumawati",  loc:"Pembeli, Serene Hills Cluster A", text:"Agen kami benar-benar memahami kebutuhan keluarga dan tidak pernah terburu-buru. Pengalaman membeli rumah yang menyenangkan." },
  { init:"B", name:"Budi Hartono",     loc:"Investor, Ivory Grand House",     text:"Investasi terbaik yang pernah saya lakukan. Havenest membantu saya menemukan properti dengan potensi nilai sangat baik di lokasi premium." },
